◎简　　介  

　　Seeking to find the most beautiful and remote places on planet earth, the two adventurers Matthias "Hauni“ Haunholder and Matthias Mayr were once again successful.Less than 800 kilometres away from the north pole you can find the Arctic Cordillera. It is the most northern mountain range of the world, located on Ellesmere Island. Getting there and skiing the most northern slope...
